name: The Chaos Creator
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>混沌の創世神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス・クリエイター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your GY. If you control this card that was Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 3 banished monsters with different names; Special Summon 1 of them, then place the rest on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use this effect of "The Chaos Creator" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your GY. If you control this card that was Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 3 banished monsters with different names; Special Summon 1 of them, then place the rest on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use this effect of "The Chaos Creator" once per turn.
eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT and 1 DARK monster from your GY. If you control this card that was Special Summoned from the hand: You can target 3 banished monsters with different names; Special Summon 1 of them, then place the rest on the bottom of the Deck in any order. You can only use this effect of "The Chaos Creator" once per turn.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Ignition, Condition
action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
